subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-21
subcodes.first_line: In one of the American cities I was invited by the Jews to speak. As they had strong enmity, it was now the time to prove the validity of Christ.
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
